name: Meadow Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the dry ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Gradually add buttermilk, mixing just until combined and set aside for 20 minutes to allow the cereal to soften.
3. Add melted butter and beaten eggs. Mix gently without overworking the batter.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15-18 minutes or until golden brown.
